summary: Iteration 22 - Herion Platform Batch Update Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Empty States & Guided UX - all empty/waiting states show explanatory messages with CTAs, (2) Dashboard Agent Activity Widget - 'Attivita Agenti' widget with agent names, client names, OK/Active/Error status badges, 'Vedi tutto' link, (3) Progress Indicator on Practices List - 6-dot progress bar per practice row with green/teal/gray dots and '!' for blocked, (4) Brand Identity Refactor - new geometric H SVG logo (viewBox 0 0 28 32) with 'Herion' + 'Virtual Accountant' text on all pages. All UI text in Italian. Backend API tests: 9/9 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed.
critical_code_review_comments: New geometric H logo correctly implemented as inline SVG with viewBox='0 0 28 32' and 3 rects (2 pillars + 1 bridge)
HerionBrand, HerionIcon, HerionMark, HerionMarkLight components properly exported and used across all pages
Dashboard agent_activity widget correctly displays agent names, client names, and status badges (OK/Attivo/Err)
Practices list PROGRESSO column shows 6-dot progress indicator with correct color coding
Empty states provide clear guidance: 'Nessuna pratica ancora', 'Nessuna attivita agenti', 'Cerca nelle tue pratiche'
Backend GET /api/dashboard/stats correctly returns agent_activity array aggregated from practice agent_logs
Backend GET /api/practices correctly returns step_index (0-5 or -1 for blocked) and user_status for each practice
Status filter dropdown includes new options: Non iniziata, Attesa documenti, Verifica richiesta, Pronta invio
seed_data_creation: Created test practice with TEST_ prefix for testing step_index, cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested the batch update features. Key features verified: (1) Geometric H Logo: SVG with viewBox='0 0 28 32', 3 rects forming H shape, color #0ABFCF, used via HerionBrand/HerionIcon components on login, welcome, dashboard sidebar, practice detail. (2) Agent Activity Widget: Dashboard shows 'Attivita Agenti' header with Bot icon, 'Vedi tutto' link to /agents, displays agent branded_name, client_name, status (OK/Attivo/Err). (3) Progress Indicator: Practices list has PROGRESSO column with 6 dots - green for completed (s < step_index), teal for current (s === step_index), gray for remaining, '!' for blocked (step_index === -1). (4) Empty States: Dashboard 'Nessuna pratica ancora' with CTA, Agent widget 'Nessuna attivita agenti' with explanation, Search 'Cerca nelle tue pratiche' with instructions. (5) Status Filters: Non iniziata, Attesa documenti, Verifica richiesta, Pronta invio. All tests passed.

details: Welcome page: HerionBrand with geometric H logo (viewBox 0 0 28 32)
Login page: HerionBrand with geometric H logo
Dashboard sidebar: HerionBrand with geometric H logo
Practice detail sidebar: HerionBrand with geometric H logo
Logo consists of 3 rects: 2 pill-shaped pillars + 1 rounded bridge
Color: #0ABFCF (teal)
'Herion' text in teal, 'Virtual Accountant' subtitle
'Attivita Agenti' header with Bot icon
'Vedi tutto' link to /agents page
Agent items show: branded_name, client_name, status badge
Status badges: OK (green), Attivo (blue), Err (red)
Empty state: 'Nessuna attivita agenti' with explanation
Backend returns agent_activity array in dashboard/stats
PROGRESSO column in practices list table
6-dot progress bar per practice row
Green dots for completed steps (s < step_index)
Teal dot for current step (s === step_index)
Gray dots for remaining steps (s > step_index)
'!' mark for blocked/escalated practices (step_index === -1)
Backend returns step_index (0-5 or -1) for each practice
Dashboard: 'Nessuna pratica ancora' with CTA 'Crea la prima pratica'
Agent widget: 'Nessuna attivita agenti' + 'Gli agenti si attivano quando avvii l'analisi'
Search: 'Cerca nelle tue pratiche' + 'Scrivi il nome del cliente...'
Search no results: 'Nessun risultato' + 'Controlla l'ortografia'
Practice detail: 'Nessun documento ancora' + 'Carica i documenti per avviare'
Agents page: '12 agenti specializzati lavorano sulle tue pratiche'
Non iniziata (draft)
Attesa documenti (waiting_user_documents)
Verifica richiesta (waiting_user_review)
Pronta invio (ready_for_submission)
Completata (completed)
Bloccata (blocked)
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns agent_activity array
GET /api/practices returns step_index and user_status for each practice
GET /api/practices/{id} returns current_step and user_status
GET /api/agents/info returns agents list with total_agents count
POST /api/auth/login works with admin@aic.it / Admin123!
